Extract reference level terms and counts

Source: R/clean.R
get_reference_levels.Rd

Identifies reference levels for factor predictors in a model and returns their names and observation counts.

Usage

get_reference_levels(model, model_data)

Arguments

model

A fitted model object.

model_data

The data used to fit the model.

Value

A list with elements terms (character vector of reference terms) and n_values (named integer vector of counts).

On this page
